title_en: ChatGPT Pro $100 Plan: 5X Usage Limits for Developers
summary_en: OpenAI introduces mid-tier $100 monthly plan targeting developers and AI coders. Offers 5X usage limits compared to Plus plan, bridging gap between $20 and $200 tiers.

title_en: Meta AI App Hits #5 After Muse Spark Launch
summary_en: Meta AI climbed from #57 to #5 on App Store following new proprietary model launch. Shows strong user adoption of Meta's first closed-source AI assistant.

title_en: LLM Traffic Converts 30-40% Higher Than Traditional Sources
summary_en: AI-referred traffic shows 30-40% conversion rates, but most enterprises aren't optimizing for it. Answer engine optimization becoming critical for capturing AI-driven revenue.

title_en: Build Custom GPTs: Complete OpenAI Academy Guide
summary_en: Learn to create custom GPTs for automating workflows and building AI assistants. OpenAI's official course covers consistent outputs and purpose-built tools.

title_en: Claude Mythos Finds Thousands of Security Vulnerabilities Autonomously
summary_en: Anthropic's unreleased Claude Mythos discovered major vulnerabilities across operating systems and browsers. Company keeping model private due to cybersecurity implications.

title_en: Intuit AI Compresses Months of Tax Implementation Into Hours
summary_en: TurboTax team used AI to implement 900-page tax code changes in days instead of months. Template workflow adaptable to any regulated industry development.

title_en: ChatGPT for Customer Success Teams: Complete Training
summary_en: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts and reduce churn. Covers communication improvement, adoption strategies, and renewal processes.

title_en: Research with ChatGPT: Master Search and Analysis
summary_en: OpenAI's guide to research using ChatGPT search and deep research features. Learn to find current information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.

title_en: Data Analysis with ChatGPT: Complete Training Guide
summary_en: Learn to analyze datasets, create visualizations, and generate actionable insights with ChatGPT. Covers exploring data and turning findings into business decisions.

title_en: Writing with ChatGPT: Draft and Refine Content
summary_en: Master content creation using ChatGPT for writing, drafting, and revision. Learn to structure content with clear tone and intent for better results.

title_en: AI Overviews Cut Organic Click-Through Rate by 58%
summary_en: Google's AI Overviews appear in 30% of searches, reducing first position CTR dramatically. Paid search teams adapting strategies as impressions hold but clicks drop.

title_en: GEO Best Practices: Don't Chase Prompt Volume
summary_en: Generative engine optimization success shouldn't focus on high-volume prompts. Data is mostly estimated, and better strategies exist for AI visibility.

title_en: Microsoft Releases Open-Source AI Agent Security Toolkit
summary_en: New toolkit forces runtime governance on enterprise AI agents executing code. Addresses security concerns as autonomous models access corporate networks faster than policies.

title_en: Meta Abandons Open-Source with Proprietary Muse Spark Model
summary_en: Meta launches first closed AI model under Superintelligence Labs, departing from Llama's open-source approach. Marks major shift in company's AI strategy.

title_en: AI Agents Create Security Chaos: Claude and OpenClaw Reality
summary_en: Autonomous AI agents like Claude Cowork and OpenClaw bring existential job security debates. Comparison shows both promise and chaos of agentic AI.

title_en: Start a Service Business: Replace Your Income Step-by-Step
summary_en: Service businesses offer fastest path to extra income with minimal startup costs. Learn step-by-step process from someone who escaped their corporate job.

title_en: 28 Odd Job Apps: Make Up to $100/Hour
summary_en: Flexible odd job apps help you earn money on your schedule. Comprehensive list of legitimate platforms offering up to $100 hourly rates.

title_en: Get Paid for Your Data: 17 Ways Earning $500/Year
summary_en: Big data generates $270 billion by 2026, and your personal data has value. Learn legitimate ways to monetize your information for steady income.

title_en: AI is Now Both Weapon and Target: Security Gets Serious
summary_en: Four major AI attack vectors emerged in one week, including weaponized agents and compromised packages. CVE numbers and attribution reports show escalating threats.

title_en: IBM: AI Governance Protects Enterprise Profit Margins
summary_en: Robust AI governance essential for protecting enterprise margins and secure infrastructure management. Business leaders must invest in governance to maintain profitability.
